generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on the permanent magnet synchronous motor for high-resolution positional feedback"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind the gearbox for backlash reduction and positional accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
    base:desc "Motor position data streamed via MQTT protocol"
]

instance GearboxPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
    base:desc "Gearbox position data streamed via MQTT protocol"
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor position data (r_M) from the motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Gearbox position data from secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gear transmission component in the MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance CycloidalGear : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gear component in the MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance MABIMAX100Robot : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "MABI MAX 100 serial robot system in manufacturing environment"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearTransmission, CycloidalGear
]

instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML-based structural model of the robot axis for component and connector perspectives"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SimulinkFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink-based friction model for the robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for dynamic system simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling and component perspectives"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance RFLPMethodology : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RFLP methodology for hierarchical abstraction across requirements, functions, logic, and physics layers"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
]

instance OOSEMMethodology : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OOSEM methodology for object-oriented system engineering"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance SPESMethodology : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SPES methodology for embedded systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance SMArDTMethodology : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SMArDT methodology for system complexity management"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance ACMEADL : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACME Architecture Description Language for component and interface modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance AADLADL : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AADL for system architecture modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance MontiArcADL : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc for behavior modeling and component composition"
    DTDFVocab:enables BehaviorModelingService
]

instance SysMLIBDs : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML IBDs for component and connector perspectives"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance MontiArcAutomaton : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton for behavior modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables BehaviorModelingService
]

instance SysMLStateMachines : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML v1.7 state machines for behavior modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables BehaviorModelingService
]

instance CppProgramming : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for detailed system behavior implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables BehaviorImplementationService
]

instance JavaProgramming : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java for general-purpose system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:enables BehaviorImplementationService
]

instance FrictionAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Analysis of friction loss relations for the robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Live-data linking and dashboard visualization for operational efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalInsight
]

instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Structural modeling of robot components and connectors using SysML IBDs"
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralInsight
]

instance BehaviorModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Behavior modeling using MontiArc Automaton and SysML state machines"
    DTDFVocab:provides BehaviorInsight
]

instance BehaviorImplementationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "System behavior implementation using C++ and Java"
    DTDFVocab:provides BehaviorImplementationInsight
]

instance FrictionLossInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction loss analysis insights for enhanced accuracy in motion control"
]

instance OperationalInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time operational efficiency insights from dashboard visualization"
]

instance StructuralInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural model insights for component and connector perspectives"
]

instance BehaviorInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Behavior model insights for system dynamics analysis"
]

instance BehaviorImplementationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Implementation insights for system behavior using C++ and Java"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses a development phase utilizing Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) with SysML modeling across abstraction levels (requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, product/technical layer) and methodologies such as RFLP (Requirements, Functions, Logics, Physics), transitioning to an operational phase where continuous model updates occur based on real-time data from physical assets like robot axes during operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Uncertainty sources include joint friction, load variations, and temperature effects; validation via comparison of simulated data against measured data to quantify deviations, with sensor arrangements reducing positional uncertainty and backlash."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT communication protocol with publish-subscribe topology for data streaming between physical and digital components."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Sensor data is streamed via MQTT protocol, and Asset Administration Shells (AAS) are implemented for system integration."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The system includes a physical safety cell that restricts the maximum working range to ensure safe operation."
]
